skills.description: Maintains a local mirror of Netdata-org source repositories at `${NETDATA_REPOS_DIR}` so AI assistants and developers can do cross-repo grep / code review locally without GitHub API round-trips and rate limits. Ships a vendored sync script (`scripts/sync-netdata-repos.sh`) that updates ~150 repos in two phases (resync existing on default branch, discover and clone new).
